name: Slate
description: Completely customizable framework for building rich text editors in React

description.value: A completely customizable framework for building rich text editors, with a nested document model and plugin-first architecture

framework.comment: React-first; community packages for Vue (slate-vue3) and Angular (slate-angular)

base-library.comment: Slate is an original implementation, not a wrapper

data-model.comment: Nested JSON tree structure parallel to DOM

bundle-size.comment: 30.1KB gzipped for core slate package; slate-react adds more

headless.comment: Core slate package can run without React for transforms

realtime-collab.comment: Via slate-yjs or slate-collaborative; not built-in

collab-protocol.comment: slate-yjs uses Yjs; slate-collaborative uses Automerge

offline-support.comment: Via Yjs integration; inherits Yjs offline capabilities

change-tracking.comment: Not built-in; would need custom implementation

comments.comment: Not built-in; can be implemented as custom elements

tables.comment: Not built-in; available via Plate plugin ecosystem

images.comment: Void elements support images; examples in docs

embeds.comment: Void elements can render any React component

code-blocks.comment: Basic code blocks; syntax highlighting via custom implementation

math-latex.comment: Not built-in; can be implemented as void element

mentions.comment: Not built-in; community plugins like slate-mention-editor available

emoji-picker.comment: Not built-in; would need custom implementation

slash-commands.comment: Not built-in; can be implemented but requires significant custom work

drag-drop-blocks.comment: Not built-in; available via Plate or custom implementation

nested-blocks.comment: Core feature - recursive tree structure supports arbitrary nesting

toolbar.comment: No default toolbar; fully custom via React components

mobile-support.comment: Works on mobile; some edge cases with virtual keyboards

keyboard-shortcuts.comment: Via is-hotkey library; customizable onKeyDown handlers

find-replace.comment: Not built-in; would need custom implementation

spell-check.comment: Browser native spell check works with contentEditable

plugin-system.comment: Plugin-first architecture; can augment editor object

custom-nodes.comment: Define custom Element and Void nodes

custom-marks.comment: Custom Leaf rendering for inline formatting

schema-customization.comment: Schema-less by design; define your own structure with normalizers

themes.comment: No built-in theming; CSS styling is fully custom

documentation-quality.comment: Good walkthroughs and concepts; API reference could be more comprehensive

npm-downloads.comment: Weekly downloads for core slate package
